Launch rewards

Zavora Bank Payout Reward

Spend $100+ and request a $10 bank payout after your order is delivered and the 24-hour confirmation window is complete.

Claim Reward ID

Enter the unique Reward ID from your delivered order email. Each reward can be claimed once and reviewed for bank payout.

Reward Terms & Conditions

Reward Rules

Orders must be delivered, not returned, not cancelled, and not refunded.

Approved claims are processed as bank payout requests, not Zavora account balance.
